title: 日本ダービーの後に・宙吊り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon runs a magnificent race in the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only the Kikuka Sho remains in the Triple Crown
tour. However, Agnes Tachyon reminds me not to
get my hopes up and returns to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still uncertain as to whether or not she'll run in
the Kikuka Sho, we begin our preparations all the
same.
